skill.name: coda-automation
skill.description: Automate Coda tasks via Rube MCP (Composio): manage docs, pages, tables, rows, formulas, permissions, and publishing. Always search tools first for current schemas.
skill.summary: Automate Coda tasks via Rube MCP (Composio): manage docs, pages, tables, rows, formulas, permissions...
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All 77 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The skill is a documentation/guide for Coda MCP operations. External command patterns are markdown code formatting, network is the legitimate rube.app endpoint, weak crypto and system reconnaissance are scanner misinterpretations of documentation text. Safe to publish.

content.value_statement: Managing Coda documents manually takes time and effort. This skill provides automated workflows for searching documents, managing tables, rows, formulas, permissions, and publishing via the Rube MCP server.
actual_capabilities: Search and browse Coda documents by query or list all available docs
Resolve Coda URLs to document, page, and table IDs automatically
List, read, and write table rows with upsert operations
Manage document permissions and sharing settings
Export documents to HTML or Markdown format
Publish and unpublish documents with custom domains
limitations: Requires Rube MCP server to be configured and connected
Requires active Coda connection via the Composio platform
Cannot modify document structure (add/remove tables, columns)

use_cases.title: Automate Document Workflows
use_cases.description: Search and manage Coda documents programmatically, reducing manual document handling
use_cases.target_user: Team leads and project managers who use Coda for documentation

use_cases.title: Data Synchronization
use_cases.description: Sync external data with Coda tables using upsert operations
use_cases.target_user: Developers and data analysts integrating Coda with other systems

use_cases.title: Document Publishing
use_cases.description: Publish Coda documents publicly or manage access permissions
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and teams sharing documentation externally

prompt_templates.title: Find a Document
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for Coda documents containing the term 'project timeline' and list the first 5 results with their IDs.

prompt_templates.title: Get Table Data
prompt_templates.prompt: List all tables in document 'AbCdEfGhIj', then list all rows from the 'Tasks' table with column names.

prompt_templates.title: Upsert Data
prompt_templates.prompt: Upsert a row into table 'Employees' in document 'AbCdEfGhIj' with keyColumn 'email'. Row data: name='John Doe', email='john@example.com', department='Engineering'.

prompt_templates.title: Publish Document
prompt_templates.prompt: Publish document 'AbCdEfGhIj' with slug 'my-public-doc' and get the sharing metadata to verify access settings.

output_examples.output:
Found 3 documents:
1. Q4 Budget Plan (docId: WxYz1234) - Last modified: Jan 15
2. Team Budget 2024 (docId: AbCd5678) - Last modified: Dec 20
3. Budget Template (docId: EfGh9012) - Last modified: Nov 05

Export completed successfully. Download URL: https://coda-export... (valid for 1 hour)
Format: markdown
Pages exported: 3

Permission added successfully.
Access level: write
Recipient: colleague@company.com
Email notification: sent

best_practices: Always call RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS first to get the current tool schemas as they may change
Use CODA_RESOLVE_BROWSER_LINK to convert Coda URLs to IDs rather than manually extracting them
Use keyColumns with unique values for reliable upsert operations
anti_patterns: Do not assume table or column IDs are stable - always list them first
Do not skip checking connection status before running workflows
Do not forget to handle rate limits - implement backoff for 429 responses

faq.question: How do I connect to Coda?
faq.answer: Add https://rube.app/mcp as an MCP server, then call RUBE_MANAGE_CONNECTIONS with toolkit 'coda' to authenticate.

faq.question: What is the difference between table ID and table name?
faq.answer: Table IDs are system identifiers like 'grid-abc', while table names are human-readable. Use CODA_LIST_TABLES to get IDs.

faq.question: How does upsert work?
faq.answer: Upsert inserts a row if no match exists on keyColumns, or updates the row if a match is found.

faq.question: Can I export entire documents?
faq.answer: Yes, use CODA_BEGIN_CONTENT_EXPORT with outputFormat 'html' or 'markdown' for full or partial exports.

faq.question: What permission levels are available?
faq.answer: Three levels: readonly (view only), write (edit), and comment (can add comments).

faq.question: How do I handle rate limits?
faq.answer: Implement exponential backoff on 429 responses. Use bulk operations via CODA_UPSERT_ROWS instead of individual updates.
